# komodo_swarm_configs (Data Source)

Lists Docker Swarm configs on a Komodo swarm.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_swarm_configs" "example" {
  swarm = "my-swarm"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `swarm` (String) The swarm name or ID to query.

### Read-Only

- `configs` (Attributes List) The list of swarm configs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configs))

<a id="nestedatt--configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configs`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The swarm config ID.
- `name` (String) The swarm config name.
